title: urostigma eriobotryoides
intro: Urostigma eriobotryoides, also known as the Chinese hawthorn or Maythorn, is a plant species native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Urostigma eriobotryoides include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. Urostigma eriobotryoides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
